dashboard.headline: Train, deploy, and query ML models - all on your own machine.
dashboard.subhead: Upload a dataset, pick a model (including AutoGluon, zero-config), and deploy to a live API. No cloud dependencies. Your data never leaves the host.
dashboard.stepTrain: Pick a model - or let AutoGluon
dashboard.stepDeploy: One click to a live API

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.subtitle: Upload tabular data and profile columns automatically.
datasets.empty: No datasets yet. Upload your first CSV or Parquet file to begin.

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.subtitle: Group related training runs and track progress over time.
experiments.empty: No experiments yet. Start a new run to create one.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.subtitle: Live endpoints for your trained model versions.
deployments.empty: No deployments yet. Promote a model version to a live endpoint.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Registered model versions ready for deployment.
models.empty: No models registered yet. Finish a run to register a version.
